name: Taiba Investments Co.
summary: Taiba Investments Co. invests in, owns, buys, sells, leases, operates, maintains, and manages real estate properties in Saudi Arabia. The company also invests in, owns, operates, maintains, and manages hotels, hospitals, and recreational and tourist facilities; and operates, maintains, and manages cities, and public and private facilities. In addition, the company is involved in architectural, civil, mechanical, and electrical contracting; and agricultural, industrial, and mining activities. Further, it is involved in the provision of credit and mortgage services. The company was formerly known as Taiba Holding Co. and changed its name to Taiba Investments Co. in May 2019. Taiba Investments Co. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Medina, Saudi Arabia.
